No Poverty.reason: The course content provides no explicit or implicit evidence related to poverty eradication or social protection measures.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a university-level elective (Target 4.3) focused on developing 'AI talent' and 'hands-on development experience' in Agentic AI for Finance, directly enhancing relevant skills for employment (Target 4.4).

develop AI talent equipping AMD based solution
